info.title: ShipSystem Training Simulation API
info.description: Training, demonstration, replay, and audit API only. This contract does not define any real weapon-control, fire-control, electronic-warfare, or radar control interface.

200.description: Store is ready and migrations are current

post.description: Stores a validated training/demo scenario for later runs. This does not provision or command external systems.

put.description: Built-in and file scenarios are read-only templates; copy them before editing.

post.summary: Copy a scenario into a managed version
Disable a managed scenario without deleting it

200.description: Recent runs visible to the caller

post.description: The action records training/audit behavior only. It does not command any external device.

put.summary: Update run training metadata and archive state

get.summary: List event annotations for a run
List persisted audit log entries for a run
Get or export a training report

get.description: Authenticated deployments require a short-lived one-time ticket query value from POST /api/runs/{run_id}/ws-ticket.

101.description: WebSocket upgrade. Messages are WebSocketSnapshotMessage JSON values.
